title: GitHub Actions Workflows
text: Trigger: repository_dispatch (type: ratings-trigger) manual workflow_dispatch Two-job pipeline computes TORP ratings builds match predictions. : compute-ratings – Runs data-raw/03-ratings/run_ratings_pipeline.R rebuild player game data TORP ratings, uploads torpdata build-predictions – Runs data-raw/02-models/build_match_predictions.R generate weekly match predictions Manual trigger: Actions tab > “Daily Ratings & Predictions” > “Run workflow” force – Force run, skip checks week_override – Override prediction week (leave empty auto-detect) failure: Automatically creates/updates GitHub issue bug + automation labels.

text: TORP (Total Overall Rating Points) evaluates players across four components. See vignette("torp-guide") full methodology.

title: Getting Started with torp
text: torp includes three core models enrich play--play data: See vignette("torp-guide") details model.
code: pbp <- load_pbp(2025, rounds = 1:5) pbp_clean <- clean_pbp(pbp)  # Expected Points -- predicts point value of each possession pbp_ep <- add_epv_vars(pbp_clean)  # Win Probability -- estimates each team's chance of winning pbp_wp <- add_wp_vars(pbp_ep)  # Shot Model -- goal/behind/miss probabilities for shots shots <- pbp_wp[!is.na(pbp_wp$shot_at_goal), ] shots <- add_shot_vars(shots)

title: torp Reference Guide
text: Collection: Raw data fetched AFL API via torp’s get_afl_*() functions Processing: torp cleans data, adds EP/WP/shot model predictions Storage: Processed data uploaded torpdata GitHub releases parquet files Loading: torp load_*() functions download torpdata demand Models: Trained models stored torpmodels, loaded via load_model_with_fallback()
code: AFL API (get_afl_*) --> torp (clean + enrich) --> torpdata (store)                             |                        torpmodels (models)                             |                        torp (predict)

title: torp Reference Guide
code: library(torp) pbp <- load_pbp(2025) pbp <- load_pbp(2025, rounds = 1:10) pbp_all <- load_pbp(TRUE, rounds = TRUE)

title: torp Reference Guide
text: data downloads cached disk. Fixtures cached -memory within session. Models cached memory avoid reloading.

title: torp Reference Guide
text: TORP (Total Overall Rating Points) evaluates AFL players across four skill categories using play--play expected points data.
code: torp = recv/(wt + prior_recv) + disp/(wt + prior_disp)      + spoil/(wt + prior_spoil) + hitout/(wt + prior_hitout)

title: torp Reference Guide
text: Disposal (torp_disp): Value added kicks handballs (delta EPV). Receiving (torp_recv): Value receiving disposal (EPV change receiver). Spoil/Tackle (torp_spoil): Defensive impact spoils, tackles, pressure acts. Hitout (torp_hitout): Ruck contribution hitouts ruck contests.

title: torp Reference Guide
code: library(torp) ratings <- calculate_torp_ratings() ratings <- calculate_torp_ratings(season_val = 2025, round_val = 15)  # Game-level game_ratings <- player_game_ratings(season_val = 2025, round_num = 10)  # Season totals season <- player_season_ratings(2025)

title: torp Reference Guide
text: Decay varies component: Receiving 260 days, Spoil 295 days, Disposal/Hitout 700 days. game one year ago weight ~0.24 receiving, ~0.59 disposal.

title: torp Reference Guide
code: player_game_data <- load_player_game_data(TRUE) player_details <- load_player_details(2025) ratings <- calculate_torp_ratings(   season_val = 2025, round_val = 15,   plyr_tm_df = player_details,   player_game_data = player_game_data )

title: torp Reference Guide
text: Three core models enrich play--play data. Models load torpmodels cached memory.

title: torp Reference Guide
code: library(torp) pbp <- load_pbp(2025, rounds = 1:10) pbp_clean <- clean_pbp(pbp) pbp_ep <- add_epv_vars(pbp_clean)        # Expected Points pbp_wp <- add_wp_vars(pbp_ep)            # Win Probability shots <- pbp_wp[!is.na(pbp_wp$shot_at_goal), ] shots <- add_shot_vars(shots)             # Shot Model

title: torp Reference Guide
text: XGBoost model: 5 outcome probabilities. Adds exp_pts delta_epv.

title: torp Reference Guide
text: Ensemble XGBoost + baseline. Adds wp, wpa, wp_category, high_leverage.

title: torp Reference Guide
text: GAM 3-class probabilities. Adds goal_prob, behind_prob, clanger_prob, xscore.

title: torp Reference Guide
text: simulate_season() simulates remaining AFL matches using team TORP ratings. unplayed match: expected margin TORP difference + home advantage (6 pts) + random noise (SD = 26 pts).
code: sim_result <- simulate_season(sim_teams, sim_games)  # Multiple simulations n_sims <- 1000 all_sims <- lapply(seq_len(n_sims), function(i) {   sim <- simulate_season(sim_teams, sim_games)   sim$sim_id <- i   sim }) all_sims_df <- data.table::rbindlist(all_sims)

Default EPR_DECAY_RECV. decay_disp Decay factor (days) disposal component. Default EPR_DECAY_DISP. decay_spoil Decay factor (days) spoil component. Default EPR_DECAY_SPOIL. decay_hitout Decay factor (days) hitout component. Default EPR_DECAY_HITOUT. loading loading factor EPR calculations. Default EPR_LOADING_DEFAULT. prior_games_recv number prior games consider receiving. Default EPR_PRIOR_GAMES_RECV. prior_games_disp number prior games consider disposal. Default EPR_PRIOR_GAMES_DISP. plyr_tm_df Optional pre-loaded player team data. NULL, load automatically. player_game_data Optional pre-loaded player game data. Default EPR_PRIOR_GAMES_HITOUT. fixtures Optional pre-loaded fixtures data. NULL, load automatically. skills Controls TOG-weighted average adjustment. active, EPR components re-centered "TOG-weighted average" subtracting weighted mean component (weighted pred_tog = squad_selection_skill * cond_tog_skill). Accepts: TRUE (default): auto-loads skills via get_player_skills(current = FALSE). data.frame player_id, cond_tog_skill, squad_selection_skill columns. FALSE NULL: skip adjustment. Players skills default weight 0 (excluded average, still average subtracted). prior_rate_recv Prior rate receiving shrinkage target. Default EPR_PRIOR_RATE_SPOIL. prior_rate_hitout Prior rate hitout shrinkage target. Default EPR_PRIOR_RATE_HITOUT.

title: EPR Ratings (Expected Possession Rating) — epr_ratings
text: season_val season calculate ratings . Default next season. round_val round calculate ratings . Default next round. decay_recv Decay factor (days) receiving component. Default EPR_DECAY_RECV. decay_disp Decay factor (days) disposal component. Default EPR_DECAY_DISP. decay_spoil Decay factor (days) spoil component. Default EPR_DECAY_SPOIL. decay_hitout Decay factor (days) hitout component. Default EPR_DECAY_HITOUT. loading loading factor EPR calculations. Default EPR_LOADING_DEFAULT. prior_games_recv number prior games consider receiving. Default EPR_PRIOR_GAMES_RECV. prior_games_disp number prior games consider disposal. Default EPR_PRIOR_GAMES_DISP. plyr_tm_df Optional pre-loaded player team data. NULL, load automatically. player_game_data Optional pre-loaded player game data. NULL, load automatically. prior_games_spoil Prior games spoil shrinkage. Default EPR_PRIOR_GAMES_SPOIL. prior_games_hitout Prior games hitout shrinkage. Default EPR_PRIOR_GAMES_HITOUT. fixtures Optional pre-loaded fixtures data. NULL, load automatically. skills Controls TOG-weighted average adjustment. active, EPR components re-centered "TOG-weighted average" subtracting weighted mean component (weighted pred_tog = squad_selection_skill * cond_tog_skill). Accepts: TRUE (default): auto-loads skills via get_player_skills(current = FALSE). data.frame player_id, cond_tog_skill, squad_selection_skill columns. FALSE NULL: skip adjustment. Players skills default weight 0 (excluded average, still average subtracted). prior_rate_recv Prior rate receiving shrinkage target. Default EPR_PRIOR_RATE_RECV. prior_rate_disp Prior rate disposal shrinkage target. Default EPR_PRIOR_RATE_DISP. prior_rate_spoil Prior rate spoil shrinkage target. Default EPR_PRIOR_RATE_SPOIL. prior_rate_hitout Prior rate hitout shrinkage target. Default EPR_PRIOR_RATE_HITOUT.

title: torp 1.1.0 (2026-03-10)
text: Fixtures: providerId → match_id, compSeason.year → season, round.roundNumber → round_number, home.score.totalScore → home_score PBP: home_team_team_name → home_team_name, home_team_score_total_score → home_score Chains: matchId → match_id, playerId → player_id, displayOrder → display_order Player stats: extended_stats_spoils → spoils, clearances_total_clearances → clearances Player game data: plyr_nm → player_name, tot_p → total_credits, recv_pts → recv_credits, tm → team Old parquet files legacy column names normalised automatically load time — data regeneration required backward compatibility.

title: torp 1.1.0 (2026-03-10)
text: Central column schema infrastructure (R/column_schema.R): per-data-type column maps (FIXTURE_COL_MAP, PBP_COL_MAP, CHAINS_COL_MAP, PLAYER_STATS_COL_MAP, PLAYER_GAME_COL_MAP, TEAMS_COL_MAP) generic .normalise_columns() function remaps old names load time.

title: torp 1.1.0 (2026-03-10)
text: Fixed dplyr data masking bug filter_game_data() renaming column tm → team caused shadow function parameter. Now uses .env$ pronoun disambiguation. Fixed get_afl_player_stats() returning providerId instead match_id output. Fixed detect_chains_columns() silently returning wrong column name mappings passed plain data.frame (non-data.table) camelCase columns.

title: torp 1.0.0 (2026-03-05)
text: load_pbp() load_chains() now default rounds = TRUE (rounds) instead current week. Callers relied getting latest round without specifying rounds now receive full season. Use rounds = get_afl_week() restore old behaviour. load_from_url() now defaults use_disk_cache = FALSE (previously TRUE). Pass use_disk_cache = TRUE explicitly want persistent disk caching. load_fixtures(= TRUE) now starts 2021 (previously 2018). Seasons 2021 outside validate_seasons() range producing errors. check_internet_connection() removed. Use curl::has_internet() directly. Unexported internal-use functions: get_wp_model_info(), check_wp_model_health(), harmonic_mean(), norm_name(). remain accessible via torp:::.

title: torp 1.0.0 (2026-03-05)
text: Local-first data loading: load_*() functions now check torpdata/data/ first, disk cache, download. Downloaded files auto-saved locally. download_torp_data() bulk-downloading parquet files offline access. Parallel downloads: Multi-URL loads use curl::multi_download() faster batch fetching. Negative cache (skip markers): 404 URLs marked .skip files avoid repeated failed downloads. Use clear_skip_markers() retry. Column selection: load_*() functions accept columns parameter read specific columns. New load functions: load_ep_wp_charts(), load_player_game_ratings(), load_player_season_ratings(), load_team_ratings(). CREDIT_POS_ADJ_QUANTILE split 4 per-dimension constants: CREDIT_POS_ADJ_QUANTILE_RECV, _DISP, _SPOIL, _HITOUT. Added R/constants.R centralized AFL model constants: AFL_GOAL_WIDTH, AFL_QUARTER_DURATION, AFL_TOTAL_GAME_SECONDS RATING_DECAY_DEFAULT_DAYS, SIM_NOISE_SD, SIM_WP_SCALING_FACTOR Placeholder dashboard functions (create_monitoring_dashboard_data(), get_model_health_status()) now return informative empty structures instead fake data.

title: torp 1.0.0 (2026-03-05)
text: parquet_from_urls_parallel() now warns instead silently dropping data column selection finds matching columns. parquet_from_urls_parallel() now errors (instead just warning) downloads completely fail local data available. mark_download_skippable() now logs write errors instead silently swallowing . read_local_parquet() now deletes files likely corruption errors, transient failures (memory, locking). load_torp_ratings() load_team_ratings() now warn returning empty data. load_from_url() now warns round filtering requested round column exists data. Integration test data loading now guarded CRAN environments. Fixed double fixture load get_afl_week() - now loads fixtures filters twice.

title: torp 1.0.0 (2026-03-05)
text: Re-optimized rating constants per-component decay: RATING_DECAY_RECV (260), RATING_DECAY_DISP (700), RATING_DECAY_SPOIL (295), RATING_DECAY_HITOUT (700). Prior games: RATING_PRIOR_GAMES_RECV (12.56), RATING_PRIOR_GAMES_DISP (5.83), RATING_PRIOR_GAMES_SPOIL (3.00), RATING_PRIOR_GAMES_HITOUT (15.00). Re-optimized credit assignment constants disposal, reception, position adjustment.

title: torp 1.0.0 (2026-03-05)
text: Merged logging_monitoring.R safe_logging.R single logging.R file better organization. Fixed global state issues replacing <<- operator package-level environment logging state. Improved AUC calculation efficiency using Mann-Whitney U-statistic (O(n log n) instead O(n^2)). Fixed inefficient rbind() patterns compare_baseline_models() evaluate_baseline_models() using pre-allocated lists dplyr::bind_rows(). Fixed mutate_all() performance issue data validation using lapply() column-wise operations. Removed unused match_id parameter match_xgs() function. Replaced deprecated dplyr::group_by_all() dplyr::group_by(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything())).

title: torp 1.0.0 (2026-03-05)
text: Added two vignettes: Getting Started torp Reference Guide (consolidating ratings, models, data architecture, simulation). Added pkgdown site configuration comprehensive reference sections. Improved README lifecycle badge, ecosystem table, torpmodels install instructions.

title: torp 1.0.0 (2026-03-05)
text: Reduced exported functions - internalized helper functions: rds_from_url(), file_reader() (internal data loading helpers) predict_wp_naive(), predict_wp_time_only() (baseline model internals) log_prediction_event(), log_data_quality() (internal logging helpers) get_wp_model_info(), check_wp_model_health() (model diagnostics) harmonic_mean(), norm_name() (utility helpers) Moved manual test scripts tests/manual/ directory. Archived legacy data-raw scripts inst/extdata/archive/scripts/. Enhanced test helper functions additional mock data creators.

title: torp 1.0.0 (2026-03-05)
text: Added tests helper_functions.R internal functions. Added tests match_xg_functions.R function signatures. Added tests sim-helpers.R simulation functions.

title: torp 0.0.0.9001
text: Initial development version. Core data loading functions AFL play--play, chains, xG, player stats. Expected points (EP) win probability (WP) models. Player rating system (TORP). Match prediction framework.
